title: HG Coffee Machine Descaler, Tough Scale Remover for Espresso & Pod Machines – 500ml
features: Coffee machine descaler liquid: Specially designed for espresso and pod coffee machines - removes scale from coffee machines safely and effectively, with no nasty taste and no scrubbing required
Universal solution: Works with many popular coffee capsule-based machines such as Gaggia, Nespresso, Krups, Vertuo, Tassimo, Lavazza, Breville, Dolce Gusto, Piccolo, DeLonghi, Pazazz & more
Simple scale removal: This espresso machine descaler uses both lactic and citric acid for a thorough clean. Works fast to tackle stubborn scale deposits up to six times with one bottle
Keeps your coffee machine working: Removes internal scale which can damage components. This descaler is odourless & fully biodegradable, ensuring there'll be no negative impact on your drainage

How to use: Pour 75ml into the water reservoir and top it up to 750ml with water. Leave the solution to work for 10 minutes. Switch the machine on and let half run through, repeat and rinse thoroughly
description: Product Description HG’s Coffee Machine Descaler is a clever multi-action liquid designed to safely and rapidly de-scale electric espresso and pod-coffee machines. The coffee pod machine descaler is odourless and fully biodegradable, and is based on citric acid which quickly and easily removes internal scale deposits from all types of espresso and capsule-based coffee machines. Electric coffee making machines can stop working when there is a build up of scale inside which can affect the internal mechanisms. For routine maintenance - to keep your coffee pod machine working at its best and to avoid white scale deposits in your drink – this fast and easy to use descaling formula is the ideal solution. With regular use of our citric-acid based descaler, your favourite coffee continues to taste fantastic, the machine retains its speed, and you extend the life of your espresso or pod-coffee machine. Manufacturers recommend descaling on the basis of lactic acid or citric acid, but HG has both. Our coffee pod machine descaler has enough for 6 treatments. Includes: 1 x bottle of HG Coffee Machine Descaler (500ml) How to use HG Coffee Machine Descaler: 1. Pour 75ml of HG’s descaler for espresso & pod-coffee machines into the water reservoir and top it up to 750ml water (10 times diluted). Leave this solution to work for 10 minutes.  2. Switch the machine on and let half of the espresso machine descaler run through. Switch the machine off and leave the product to work for 10 minutes and then let the rest of the liquid run through until the reservoir is completely empty.  3. After treatment, rinse the machine at least 3 times with clean tap water. 4. For a pod-coffee machine, you can place a holder with a used coffee pod in the machine to capture any scale. This prevents any blockages in the outflow For descaling normal coffee makers, kettles, and washing machines, we recommend HG Quick Descaler. Use as directed. Keep out of reach of children. Always read the label before use. Box Contains 1 x HG Descaler for espresso & coffee pod machines Manufacturer Contact Information Made by: HG International b.v., P.J. Oudweg 41, 1314 CJ Almere, The Netherlands. See more
